$description: NEW category. Captures the font-size and font-weight raw values currently in use in src/styles.css as a named typographic scale, so a source of truth exists. No --folia-* typography vars are defined yet (CSS adoption pending); these tokens are the new home, not a byte-match of the .folia-root block. Font-size names follow the usage ladder (xs..xl); weights named by role.

font-size.$description: Distinct font-size literals in styles.css: 10, 10.5, 11, 12, 12.5, 13, 13.5, 15, 16 px.
